name: Decimaka
author: H. G. Muller (2018) / AGP port
description: H. G. Muller's 10x10 chess variant (2018) that borrows the promotion dynamics of Maka Dai Dai Shogi: pieces promote by MAKING A CAPTURE, anywhere on the board — there is no promotion zone at all. The Fiancee (a non-royal king-mover) becomes a Queen, the Knight a Nightrider, the Tee a Trident, while the short-range Cross, Y, Star, Lion — and Pawns — all 'promote' to the humble Omni (moves orthogonally, captures diagonally). Promotion is optional, but capturing a promoted piece forces it, and capturing a Queen turns ANY capturer (except the King) into a Queen on the spot. Rooks and Bishops never promote; a Pawn reaching the last rank is dead wood. Orthodox pawns from the 3rd rank, three-step castling, checkmate wins.
